gruberGuide.excludedByPolicy: Reading and Quant layouts that cannot be paired deterministically, obsolete Analyze-an-Argument tasks, analogies, and antonyms remain audit-only.

sourceInventory.reading36QuestionPDF: Text-identical after normalization to the previously audited 36-set question PDF; the newly supplied per-set analyses improve answer and explanation cross-checking.
sourceInventory.policy: Only items with complete text, choices, and deterministic answer alignment are emitted. Duplicate and obsolete formats remain audit-only.

languagePolicy: All bundled Chinese fields are converted with OpenCC s2twp and checked for idempotence; every emitted vocabulary record has a Taiwan Traditional Chinese definition and an English example that uses its headword.
